summary: Vijaya Children's Clinic staff portal with username/password authentication and appointment viewing
architectural_notes: Single shared username/password for all staff members (hardcoded, no database required)
Staff see appointments dashboard after successful login

existing_features.title: Create a staff login page with username and password input fields where all staff members can authenticate using a single shared set of hardcoded credentials
Create an appointments dashboard page that displays all appointments and is only accessible to authenticated staff members
Implement session management to maintain staff authentication state across page reloads and navigation

new_feature_requests.summary: Staff login page with username/password fields
Backend authentication with single hardcoded credentials for all staff
Appointments dashboard for staff to view appointments after login
Session management to keep staff logged in
Implement backend authentication endpoint that validates staff credentials against a single hardcoded username and password combination
